Indicator description: Care seeking for diarrhoea - Percentage of children under age five who had diarrhoea in the two weeks preceding the survey for whom advice or treatment was sought from a health facility or provider
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Diarrhoea treatment with ORS -Percentage of children under 
age five who had diarrhoea in the two weeks preceding the survey and were given oral rehydration salts (ORS packets or pre-packaged ORS fluids)
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Diarrhoea treatment - Percentage of children under age 5 
who had diarrhoea and  received oral rehydration therapy (oral rehydration salts OR recommended homemade fluids OR increased fluids) AND continued feeding.
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Diarrhoea treatment with ORS and Zinc - Percentage of 
children under age five who had diarrhoea in the two weeks preceding the survey and were given ORS and Zinc
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description: Diarrhoea treatment with zinc - Percentage of children under age 5  with diarrhoea who received zinc supplements
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
IPTP for pregnant women - Percentage of women (aged 15–49) 
who received three or more doses of intermittent preventive treatment during antenatal care visits during their last pregnancy
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
ITN use by children - Percentage of children under age 5 who 
slept under an insecticide-treated mosquito net the night prior to the survey.
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Household with ITN and/or IRS - Percentage of households 
with at least one ITN for every two persons and /or IRS in the past 12 months
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Percentage of households with at least one insecticide 
treated mosquito net (ITN)
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Pregnant women sleeping under ITN - Percentage of 
pregnant women (age 15-49) who slept under an insecticide-treated net the previous night
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Malaria, 1st line treatment- Percentage of febrile children 
under age 5 receiving ACT (first-line antimalarial drug), among those receiving any antimalarial drugs.
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Careseeking for febrile children - Percentage of children 
under age 5 with fever for whom advice or treatment was sought
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description:
Malaria diagnostics - Percentage of febrile children under 
age 5  who had a finger or heel stick for malaria testing.
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys

Indicator description: Careseeking for ARI - Percentage of children under age 5 with acute respiratory infection symptoms whom advice or treatment was sought from a health facility or provider
Data source*: Household surveys including MICS, DHS and other national surveys
